name: File Manager
description: High-performance file explorer to manage server directories and files.

name: Web Manager
description: Premium Web Stack Wizard and Smart DB Admin Panel.
changelog_en: v1.0.2: Refactor internals by consolidating repeated helper imports and filename sanitization for clearer, lower-maintenance site management routes.
changelog_vi: v1.0.2: Refactor noi bo bang cach gom import helper lap lai va thong nhat ham sanitize ten file de route quan ly site ro rang, de bao tri hon.

name: Database Manager
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Refactor router response handling by centralizing error-unwrapping logic across database and user operations to reduce duplicated branch code.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Refactor xu ly response trong router bang cach gom logic unwrap loi cho cac thao tac database va user, giam code lap dieu kien.

name: Docker Manager
description: Manage containers, images, and stacks seamlessly.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Major Docker Manager upgrade with service-based architecture, full Docker ops APIs (containers/images/networks/volumes), complete compose lifecycle endpoints, hybrid auto-scan plus managed stacks, and stronger validation/timeouts.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Nang cap lon Docker Manager voi kien truc tach service, day du API van hanh Docker (containers/images/networks/volumes), endpoint compose lifecycle hoan chinh, mo hinh hybrid auto-scan ket hop managed stacks, cung co validate va timeout.

name: SSL Manager
changelog_en: v1.0.2: Refactor SSL router error handling and harden frontend request headers to avoid sending invalid Bearer tokens.
changelog_vi: v1.0.2: Refactor xu ly loi trong SSL router va cung co header request frontend de tranh gui Bearer token khong hop le.

name: PHP Manager
description: Control local PHP versions and php.ini configurations.

name: Terminal
description: Execute system commands securely in the browser.

name: Backup Manager
description: Zero-CLI cloud backup manager powered by rclone. Includes guided Google OAuth onboarding, profile-based remote setup, cron scheduling, real-time sync watchdog, and live progress streaming.
changelog_en: v1.2.2: Harden Google OAuth token flow by validating callback inputs, normalizing remote names for rclone compatibility, deriving token expiry from expires_in, and improving frontend popup/token handling.
changelog_vi: v1.2.2: Tang do on dinh luong token Google OAuth bang cach validate callback, chuan hoa remote name de tuong thich rclone, suy ra expiry tu expires_in, va cai thien xu ly popup/token tren frontend.

name: System Monitor
description: Real-time visibility into CPU, memory, and disk usage.

name: Firewall
description: Visual dashboard for UFW firewall rules and Fail2Ban IDS with correct jail / banned-IP display.
changelog_en: v1.0.3: Fix Fail2Ban tab crash — API returns jails as string[] and banned as {ip,jail}[]; frontend now normalizes to JailItem with banned_ips. Prevents TypeError on banned_ips.length.
changelog_vi: v1.0.3: Sửa lỗi tab Fail2Ban — API trả jails dạng chuỗi và banned dạng {ip,jail}; frontend chuẩn hóa thành JailItem có banned_ips. Tránh lỗi TypeError khi đọc .length.

name: DNS Manager
description: Manage DNS zones and records using local storage or BIND backend.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Improve reliability by using collision-resistant zone/record IDs and add frontend error handling for delete zone/record actions.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Tang do on dinh bang ID zone/record chong trung va bo sung xu ly loi tren frontend khi xoa zone/record.

name: Package Manager
description: Comprehensive Software Center for installing Runtimes, Utilities, and System Packages.

name: Platform
description: Cross-cutting platform APIs for jobs, notifications, audit logs, and real-time events.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Optimize platform UI runtime by suppressing no-op store updates and automatically tearing down idle SSE connections.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Toi uu runtime UI platform bang cach bo qua cap nhat store khong doi du lieu va tu dong dong ket noi SSE khi khong con listener.

name: Authentication
description: JWT authentication and user/permission management APIs for CoPanel.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Refactor auth router internals to reuse a single user serializer and remove repeated inline imports without changing API behavior.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Refactor noi bo auth router de dung chung ham serialize user va bo import lap lai trong ham, khong thay doi hanh vi API.

name: AppStore Manager
description: Add, remove, and upgrade third-party modules seamlessly.
changelog_en: Fix critical bug: inner 'import subprocess/shutil/platform/threading' inside conditional blocks caused UnboundLocalError on install/update when no system deps are present. All stdlib imports moved to module level.
changelog_vi: Sửa lỗi nghiêm trọng: khai báo 'import subprocess/shutil/platform/threading' bên trong khối if/for khiến Python coi chúng là biến local chưa gán → lỗi UnboundLocalError khi cài/cập nhật module không có system deps. Chuyển toàn bộ imports lên module level.
